key_additions: P-1_TOOL_ROUTE_GUARD phase — blocks canmore/image_gen/broad_api_discovery before P0
P5_COMMIT conditional_on_git_available — deferred path writes COMMIT_DEFERRED_RECEIPT
P6_UPDATE_STATE accepts commit SHA or deferred receipt reference
8 typed classes: RESEARCH, ARCHIVE_EXTRACTION, CODE_PATCH, BROWSER_VALIDATION, FULL_EXPORT, REGISTRY_RECONCILIATION, BOOT_RECOVERY, PROOF
pre_stage_classification_block schema — required in every stage receipt
enforcement_rule — at most 1 class per stage; auto-split required if 2+ detected

new_capabilities_added: CAPABILITY: Pre-execution tool routing gate (P-1) — canmore and broad API discovery can no longer crash a stage mid-execution; they are blocked before P0 with a structured receipt
CAPABILITY: Sandbox-safe commit model — stages complete cleanly whether or not git is available; all SHAs preserved in deferred receipt for full auditability
CAPABILITY: Typed runaway prevention — the auto-runaway breaker now has a machine-readable enum; 'too much work' is no longer subjective; every stage must declare its class before executing
CAPABILITY: Auto-split signal — two or more heavy work classes in a single stage now trigger a mandatory split before execution, not a post-hoc observation
chatgpt_deployment_instructions: 3. Verify both SHAs match the values in this receipt
4. The v1 runner contract remains as a fallback — do not delete it until transactional_stage_runner_v1.py is built and tested
5. Next stage: BUILD-1 — transactional_stage_runner_v1.py using v2 contract as the spec
